title: Pan-Seared Ukrainian Potato Cakes
description: Crispy Ukrainian potato cakes with a fermented twist. Perfect as a side dish or light snack.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix together grated potatoes, fermented rye flour, crispy bacon bits, chopped fresh dill, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs.
Add the eggs to the potato mixture and mix until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the pan.
Cook the patties for 3-4 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
